title: China Gate
subTitle: Colonel Puri requests his former fellow army officers court-martialed in disgrace to redeem themselves by rescuing a village from Jageera, an evil bandit.

title: Chori Mera Kaam
subTitle: Chori Mera Kaam

title: Main Inteqam Loonga
subTitle: A man discovers the truth behind his father's tragic demise and vows to avenge him, oblivious to the consequences that await him.

title: Karishma Kudrat Ka
subTitle: Vijay lives in a village with his family. He makes an enemy with Lala and a bandit, Bhagad, who devises a plan to throw the former out of the village.

title: Jaan Se Pyaara
subTitle: Inspector Jai balances working as a cop with taking care of his mother and a brother with developmental disabilities. But when he arrests a local don, he starts to fear for his family's safety.

title: Mr. Natwarlal
subTitle: When Natwar's elder brother is framed for bribery, he decides to avenge his brother's humiliation and thus poses as a crime lord.

title: Saathi
subTitle: Two boys are left to fend for themselves after their father falls victim to police brutality. They make a living through petty crimes, but things get out of hand when they cross paths with an underworld kingpin.

title: Main Khiladi Tu Anari
subTitle: A Bombay police officer seeks revenge when a drug dealer kills his brother. However, things get complicated when a film star begins to tag along, so that he can research a film role.

title: Mafia Raaj
subTitle: An honest police officer has a mission to wipe out a mafia group. But in the process, he is forced to sacrifice not only his father but also his sister.

title: Mafia Raaj
subTitle: An honest police officer has a mission to wipe out a mafia group. But in the process, he is forced to sacrifice not only his father but also his sister.

title: Love Mantra
subTitle: Shwetha falls in love with Seenu, whom she supposes to be speech impaired. Seenu feels guilty and asks a doctor to cut off his tongue to win her love.

title: Gurudev
subTitle: Dev Kumar, a police inspector, finds himself in a dilemma when has to arrest a notorious criminal who also happens to the father of his childhood friend, Guru.

title: Krishna Arjun
subTitle: A man returns home after his mother's death to discover his brother jailed for rape and murder, prompting him to investigate the truth behind the allegations.

title: Baadshah
subTitle: An amateur detective, Raj, goes by the nickname of Baadshah. But this name soon causes a misunderstanding that lands him in the middle of a conspiracy to assassinate the chief minister of Goa.

title: Vaishnavi
subTitle: Born with the divine power, Vaishnavi receives treatment as a goddess by the villagers. After getting killed, she possesses the body of another girl who looks like her to exact revenge for her death.

title: Kyon Ki
subTitle: In the chaotic environment of a faraway psychiatric hospital, love blossoms between a closed-off doctor and a rebellious patient with a troubled past.

title: Lal Baadshah
subTitle: Lal Singh, a righteous and helpful man, clashes against Dayal Singh, a powerful personality. However, things get complicated when a hidden treasure is involved and Lal's tragic past is disclosed.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: A group of four friends decide to play a prank involving the fake kidnapping of one of them and asking for ransom from her father. However, things become complicated when she actually ends up dead.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: A group of four friends decide to play a prank involving the fake kidnapping of one of them and asking for ransom from her father. However, things become complicated when she actually ends up dead.

title: Maharaja
subTitle: Bored by his monotonous lifestyle, Mahadevan, a middle-aged family man, longs to lead a modern life. However, everything begins to fall apart when he chooses to change his way of living.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
